partnersPage.metaDescription: Join the WPO Translations partner network. Earn referral commissions or offer your expertise as a translator or notary. Apply today.

hero.title: Grow together with WPO Translations
hero.subtitle: Join the partner network of Kazakhstan's digital document translation platform. Earn referral rewards, contribute your expertise, or refer your clients to WPO.

whoCanPartner.title: Who can become a partner
whoCanPartner.translatorDesc: Certified professionals who want to take on official and notarized translation orders.
whoCanPartner.notaryDesc: Notaries participating in notarized translation workflows through a partner process.
whoCanPartner.agencyDesc: Agencies referring clients who need professional document translation.
whoCanPartner.visaCenterDesc: Centers whose clients regularly need translated documents for visa applications.
whoCanPartner.migrationConsultantDesc: Consultants working with clients on relocation, residency, and citizenship documentation.
whoCanPartner.educationAgencyDesc: Agencies helping students with university applications that require translated documents.
whoCanPartner.legalFirmDesc: Law firms and legal advisors whose clients require official document translations.
whoCanPartner.corporateDesc: Companies and HR departments with recurring document translation needs.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Fill in the partner application form. Tell us about your role and how you plan to collaborate.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our team reviews your application and reaches out to discuss terms and set up your partner account.
howItWorks.step3Desc: You receive a personal referral code to share with clients or embed in your communications.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Commissions are calculated on WPO service income from completed orders referred through your link, paid monthly.

forTranslators.title: For translators
forTranslators.desc: WPO Translations works with professional certified translators for official and notarized translation orders. We handle the digital workflow, client intake, and payments — you focus on quality.
forTranslators.point1: Work on official translation orders with translator signature and bureau stamp
forTranslators.point2: Handle notarized translation as part of a structured partner process
forTranslators.point3: Transparent payout system based on language pair, document type, volume, and complexity
forTranslators.point4: Earn acquisition rewards when you refer other qualified translators to WPO

forNotaries.title: For notaries
forNotaries.desc: Notarized translation at WPO Translations is facilitated through a partner notary process. The notary reviews the certified translation and provides notarization according to their requirements.
forNotaries.point1: Participate in notarized translation workflows via a structured partner arrangement
forNotaries.point2: Requirements and procedures depend on the notary's individual practices
forNotaries.point3: WPO does not guarantee acceptance by any specific notary, authority, or institution

forOrganizations.title: For organizations and agencies
forOrganizations.desc: Refer your clients to WPO Translations and earn a referral commission on every completed, paid order. Suitable for visa centers, migration consultants, education agencies, legal firms, and corporate HR.
forOrganizations.point1: 5% commission for 1–10 referred orders per month
forOrganizations.point4: Commission calculated on WPO service income, excluding notary fees, courier, bank fees, and other pass-through costs

rewards.title: Partner rewards
rewards.translatorClientDesc: 5% commission on orders from clients you referred via your personal referral code.
rewards.translatorAcquisitionDesc: 5,000 KZT after the referred translator completes their first 5 orders. 10,000 KZT after 20 completed orders.
rewards.payoutDesc: Monthly payouts. Minimum payout threshold: 10,000 KZT.
rewards.commissionBaseDesc: Commissions are calculated on WPO net service income, excluding notary fees, courier, bank fees, government fees, refunded orders, and other pass-through costs.

disclaimer.title: Important
disclaimer.acceptance: WPO Translations does not guarantee acceptance of any translated document by banks, visa centers, universities, government bodies, notaries, or any other receiving party. Acceptance requirements vary by institution.
disclaimer.notarization: Notarized translation is facilitated through a partner process. The notary's requirements and scope of certification are determined by the notary independently.
disclaimer.rewards: Partner rewards are paid only for fully completed and paid orders without refunds. WPO reserves the right to adjust commission rates with reasonable notice.
disclaimer.passThrough: External costs such as notary fees, courier and delivery, bank fees, government fees, and other pass-through expenses are excluded from commission calculation.

form.title: Apply to become a partner
form.subtitle: Tell us about yourself and how you'd like to work with WPO Translations.
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your experience, client volume, or any questions.
form.successMessage: Thank you. Our team will review your application and contact you within a few business days.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
